tEn: Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm
tZh: 通过通用强化学习算法的自我对弈掌握国际象棋和将棋
sEn: AlphaZero achieves superhuman performance in chess, shogi, and Go through self-play reinforcement learning with no domain knowledge beyond game rules.
sZh: AlphaZero通过自我对弈强化学习，在仅知游戏规则而无领域知识的情况下，在国际象棋、将棋和围棋中达到超人类水平。
absEn: The game of chess is the most widely-studied domain in the history of artificial intelligence. The strongest programs are based on a combination of sophisticated search techniques, domain-specific adaptations, and handcrafted evaluation functions that have been refined by human experts over several decades. In contrast, the AlphaGo Zero program recently achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by tabula rasa reinforcement learning from games of self-play. In this paper, we generalise this approach into a single AlphaZero algorithm that can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance in many challenging domains. Starting from random play, and given no domain knowledge except the game rules, AlphaZero achieved within 24 hours a superhuman level of play in the games of chess and shogi (Japanese chess) as well as Go, and convincingly defeated a world-champion program in each case.
absZh: 国际象棋是人工智能历史上研究最广泛的领域。最强的程序基于复杂搜索技术、领域特定调整和人类专家数十年来精心设计的评估函数的结合。相比之下，AlphaGo Zero程序最近通过从自我对弈游戏中进行的无先验知识强化学习，在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们将这种方法推广为一个单一的AlphaZero算法，该算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过无先验知识学习达到超人类表现。从随机对弈开始，除了游戏规则外没有任何领域知识，AlphaZero在24小时内就在国际象棋、将棋（日本象棋）以及围棋中达到了超人类水平，并在每种情况下令人信服地击败了世界冠军程序。

contrib.en: Proposes AlphaZero, a single algorithm achieving superhuman play in chess, shogi, and Go via tabula rasa reinforcement learning.
contrib.zh: 提出AlphaZero，一个通过从零开始的强化学习在象棋、将棋和围棋中实现超人类水平的单一算法。

contrib.en: Uses deep neural networks and Monte-Carlo tree search without domain-specific knowledge beyond game rules.
contrib.zh: 使用深度神经网络和蒙特卡洛树搜索，除游戏规则外无需领域特定知识。

contrib.en: Defeats world-champion programs Stockfish, Elmo, and AlphaGo Zero in 100-game matches with zero losses in chess.
contrib.zh: 在100局比赛中击败世界冠军程序Stockfish、Elmo和AlphaGo Zero，象棋中零败。

contrib.en: Demonstrates MCTS scales more effectively with thinking time than alpha-beta search in chess and shogi.
contrib.zh: 证明MCTS在象棋和将棋中随思考时间的扩展效果优于alpha-beta搜索。

contrib.en: Discovers and plays common human chess openings independently during self-play training.
contrib.zh: 在自我对弈训练中独立发现并下出常见的人类象棋开局。

contrib.en: Provides a general framework applicable to multiple games without hyper-parameter tuning.
contrib.zh: 提供无需超参数调优即可适用于多种游戏的通用框架。

limits.en: Requires perfect knowledge of game rules for MCTS simulations and input encoding.
limits.zh: 需要游戏规则的完美知识用于MCTS模拟和输入编码。

limits.en: Neural network architecture may not suit games with asymmetric rules or long-range interactions.
limits.zh: 神经网络架构可能不适合具有不对称规则或长程交互的游戏。

limits.en: Training requires massive computational resources (5000 TPUs for self-play, 64 for training).
limits.zh: 训练需要大量计算资源（5000个TPU用于自我对弈，64个用于训练）。

limits.en: Does not incorporate domain-specific enhancements like opening books or endgame tablebases.
limits.zh: 未整合领域特定增强，如开局库或残局数据库。

limits.en: Performance may degrade in games with draws or non-binary outcomes due to expected outcome optimization.
limits.zh: 在平局或非二元结果的游戏中，由于期望结果优化，性能可能下降。

items.en: The game of chess is the most widely-studied domain in the history of artificial intelligence. The strongest programs are based on a combination of sophisticated search techniques, domain-specific adaptations, and handcrafted evaluation functions that have been refined by human experts over several decades. In contrast, the AlphaGo Zero program recently achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by tabula rasa reinforcement learning from games of self-play. In this paper, we generalise this approach into a single AlphaZero algorithm that can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance in many challenging domains. Starting from random play, and given no domain knowledge except the game rules, AlphaZero achieved within 24 hours a superhuman level of play in the games of chess and shogi (Japanese chess) as well as Go, and convincingly defeated a world-champion program in each case.
items.zh: 国际象棋是人工智能历史上研究最广泛的领域。最强的程序基于复杂搜索技术、领域特定调整以及由人类专家数十年精心设计的评估函数的组合。相比之下，AlphaGo Zero 程序最近通过自我对弈的强化学习，在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们将这种方法推广为一个单一的 AlphaZero 算法，该算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过零基础强化学习实现超人类表现。从随机对弈开始，除了游戏规则外没有领域知识，AlphaZero 在 24 小时内就在国际象棋、日本将棋以及围棋中达到了超人类水平，并在每种情况下令人信服地击败了世界冠军程序。

items.en: The study of computer chess is as old as computer science itself. Babbage, Turing, Shannon, and von Neumann devised hardware, algorithms and theory to analyse and play the game of chess. Chess subsequently became the grand challenge task for a generation of artificial intelligence researchers, culminating in high-performance computer chess programs that perform at superhuman level (?, ?). However, these systems are highly tuned to their domain, and cannot be generalised to other problems without significant human effort.
items.zh: 计算机象棋的研究与计算机科学本身一样古老。巴贝奇、图灵、香农和冯·诺依曼设计了硬件、算法和理论来分析和下国际象棋。国际象棋随后成为一代人工智能研究者的重大挑战任务，最终产生了达到超人类水平的高性能计算机象棋程序（?, ?）。然而，这些系统高度针对其领域进行调整，无法在没有大量人力投入的情况下推广到其他问题。

items.en: A long-standing ambition of artificial intelligence has been to create programs that can instead learn for themselves from first principles (?). Recently, the AlphaGo Zero algorithm achieved superhuman performance in the game of Go, by representing Go knowledge using deep convolutional neural networks (?, ?), trained solely by reinforcement learning from games of self-play (?). In this paper, we apply a similar but fully generic algorithm, which we call AlphaZero, to the games of chess and shogi as well as Go, without any additional domain knowledge except the rules of the game, demonstrating that a general-purpose reinforcement learning algorithm can achieve, tabula rasa, superhuman performance across many challenging domains.
items.zh: 人工智能的一个长期目标是创建能够从基本原理自行学习的程序（?）。最近，AlphaGo Zero 算法通过使用深度卷积神经网络（?, ?）表示围棋知识，仅通过自我对弈的强化学习进行训练（?），在围棋中实现了超人类表现。在本文中，我们应用了一个类似但完全通用的算法，称为 AlphaZero，应用于国际象棋、将棋以及围棋，除了游戏规则外没有任何额外的领域知识，证明了一个通用的强化学习算法可以在许多具有挑战性的领域中通过零基础学习实现超人类表现。

items.en: A landmark for artificial intelligence was achieved in 1997 when Deep Blue defeated the human world champion (?). Computer chess programs continued to progress steadily beyond human level in the following two decades. These programs evaluate positions using features handcrafted by human grandmasters and carefully tuned weights, combined with a high-performance alpha-beta search that expands a vast search tree using a large number of clever heuristics and domain-specific adaptations. In the Methods we describe these augmentations, focusing on the 2016 Top Chess Engine Championship (TCEC) world-champion Stockfish (?); other strong chess programs, including Deep Blue, use very similar architectures (?, ?).
items.zh: 人工智能的一个里程碑是在 1997 年，当时深蓝击败了人类世界冠军（?）。在接下来的二十年里，计算机象棋程序继续稳步超越人类水平。这些程序使用由人类特级大师手工设计的特征和精心调整的权重来评估局面，并结合高性能的 alpha-beta 搜索，该搜索使用大量巧妙的启发式和领域特定调整来扩展庞大的搜索树。在方法部分，我们描述了这些增强，重点关注 2016 年 Top Chess Engine Championship (TCEC) 世界冠军 Stockfish（?）；其他强大的象棋程序，包括深蓝，使用非常相似的架构（?, ?）。

items.en: Shogi is a significantly harder game, in terms of computational complexity, than chess (?, ?): it is played on a larger board, and any captured opponent piece changes sides and may subsequently be dropped anywhere on the board. The strongest shogi programs, such as Computer Shogi Association (CSA) world-champion Elmo, have only recently defeated human champions (?). These programs use a similar algorithm to computer chess programs, again based on a highly optimised alpha-beta search engine with many domain-specific adaptations.
items.zh: 将棋在计算复杂度上比国际象棋难得多（?, ?）：它在更大的棋盘上进行，任何被捕获的对手棋子都会改变阵营，随后可以放在棋盘上的任何位置。最强的将棋程序，如 Computer Shogi Association (CSA) 世界冠军 Elmo，直到最近才击败人类冠军（?）。这些程序使用与计算机象棋程序类似的算法，同样基于高度优化的 alpha-beta 搜索引擎，并带有许多领域特定的调整。

items.en: Go is well suited to the neural network architecture used in AlphaGo because the rules of the game are translationally invariant (matching the weight sharing structure of convolutional networks), are defined in terms of liberties corresponding to the adjacencies between points on the board (matching the local structure of convolutional networks), and are rotationally and reflectionally symmetric (allowing for data augmentation and ensembling). Furthermore, the action space is simple (a stone may be placed at each possible location), and the game outcomes are restricted to binary wins or losses, both of which may help neural network training.
items.zh: 围棋非常适合 AlphaGo 中使用的神经网络架构，因为游戏规则是平移不变的（匹配卷积网络的权重共享结构），根据棋盘上点之间的邻接关系定义气（匹配卷积网络的局部结构），并且是旋转和反射对称的（允许数据增强和集成）。此外，动作空间很简单（可以在每个可能的位置放置棋子），游戏结果仅限于二元胜负，这两者都可能有助于神经网络训练。

items.en: Chess and shogi are, arguably, less innately suited to AlphaGo’s neural network architectures. The rules are position-dependent (e.g. pawns may move two steps forward from the second rank and promote on the eighth rank) and asymmetric (e.g. pawns only move forward, and castling is different on kingside and queenside). The rules include long-range interactions (e.g. the queen may traverse the board in one move, or checkmate the king from the far side of the board). The action space for chess includes all legal destinations for all of the players’ pieces on the board; shogi also allows captured pieces to be placed back on the board. Both chess and shogi may result in draws in addition to wins and losses; indeed it is believed that the optimal solution to chess is a draw (?, ?, ?).
items.zh: 国际象棋和将棋可以说天生不太适合 AlphaGo 的神经网络架构。规则是位置相关的（例如，兵可以从第二排向前移动两步，并在第八排升变）且不对称的（例如，兵只能向前移动，王车易位在王翼和后翼不同）。规则包括长程交互（例如，后可以在一步内穿越棋盘，或从棋盘远端将死王）。国际象棋的动作空间包括棋盘上所有玩家棋子的所有合法目标位置；将棋还允许将捕获的棋子放回棋盘。国际象棋和将棋除了胜负外还可能产生和棋；事实上，人们认为国际象棋的最优解是和棋（?, ?, ?）。

items.en: The AlphaZero algorithm is a more generic version of the AlphaGo Zero algorithm that was first introduced in the context of Go (?). It replaces the handcrafted knowledge and domain-specific augmentations used in traditional game-playing programs with deep neural networks and a tabula rasa reinforcement learning algorithm.
items.zh: AlphaZero 算法是 AlphaGo Zero 算法的更通用版本，后者最初是在围棋背景下引入的（?）。它用深度神经网络和零基础强化学习算法取代了传统游戏程序中使用的精心设计的知识和领域特定增强。

items.en: Instead of a handcrafted evaluation function and move ordering heuristics, AlphaZero utilises a deep neural network (𝐩,v)=fθ​(s)𝐩𝑣subscript𝑓𝜃𝑠(\mathbf{p},v)=f_{\theta}(s) with parameters θ𝜃\theta. This neural network takes the board position s𝑠s as an input and outputs a vector of move probabilities 𝐩𝐩\mathbf{p} with components pa=P​r​(a|s)subscript𝑝𝑎𝑃𝑟conditional𝑎𝑠p_{a}=Pr(a|s) for each action a𝑎a, and a scalar value v𝑣v estimating the expected outcome z𝑧z from position s𝑠s, v≈𝔼​[z|s]𝑣𝔼delimited-[]conditional𝑧𝑠v\approx\mathbb{E}[z|s]. AlphaZero learns these move probabilities and value estimates entirely from self-play; these are then used to guide its search.
items.zh: AlphaZero 没有使用手工设计的评估函数和走法排序启发式，而是利用了一个深度神经网络 (𝐩,v)=fθ(s)，参数为 θ。该神经网络以棋盘位置 s 作为输入，输出一个走法概率向量 𝐩，其分量 pa=Pr(a|s) 对应每个动作 a，以及一个标量值 v，估计从位置 s 出发的期望结果 z，即 v≈𝔼[z|s]。AlphaZero 完全从自我对弈中学习这些走法概率和价值估计；然后使用它们来指导其搜索。

items.en: Instead of an alpha-beta search with domain-specific enhancements, AlphaZero uses a general-purpose Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm. Each search consists of a series of simulated games of self-play that traverse a tree from root sr​o​o​tsubscript𝑠𝑟𝑜𝑜𝑡s_{root} to leaf. Each simulation proceeds by selecting in each state s𝑠s a move a𝑎a with low visit count, high move probability and high value (averaged over the leaf states of simulations that selected a𝑎a from s𝑠s) according to the current neural network fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta}. The search returns a vector π𝜋\mathbf{\pi} representing a probability distribution over moves, either proportionally or greedily with respect to the visit counts at the root state.
items.zh: AlphaZero 没有使用带有领域特定增强的 alpha-beta 搜索，而是使用了一个通用的蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 算法。每次搜索由一系列模拟的自我对弈游戏组成，这些游戏从根节点 sroot 遍历树到叶子节点。每次模拟通过在当前神经网络 fθ 的指导下，在每个状态 s 中选择一个访问次数低、走法概率高且价值高（根据从 s 选择 a 的模拟的叶子状态的平均值）的走法 a 进行。搜索返回一个向量 π，表示走法上的概率分布，根据根状态的访问次数按比例或贪婪地选择。

items.en: The parameters θ𝜃\theta of the deep neural network in AlphaZero are trained by self-play reinforcement learning, starting from randomly initialised parameters θ𝜃\theta. Games are played by selecting moves for both players by MCTS, at∼𝝅tsimilar-tosubscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝝅𝑡a_{t}\sim\boldsymbol{\pi}_{t}. At the end of the game, the terminal position sTsubscript𝑠𝑇s_{T} is scored according to the rules of the game to compute the game outcome z𝑧z: −11-1 for a loss, 00 for a draw, and +11+1 for a win. The neural network parameters θ𝜃\theta are updated so as to minimise the error between the predicted outcome vtsubscript𝑣𝑡v_{t} and the game outcome z𝑧z, and to maximise the similarity of the policy vector 𝐩tsubscript𝐩𝑡\mathbf{p}_{t} to the search probabilities 𝝅tsubscript𝝅𝑡\boldsymbol{\pi}_{t}. Specifically, the parameters θ𝜃\theta are adjusted by gradient descent on a loss function l𝑙l that sums over mean-squared error and cross-entropy losses respectively,
items.zh: AlphaZero 中深度神经网络的参数 θ 通过自我对弈强化学习进行训练，从随机初始化的参数 θ 开始。游戏通过 MCTS 为双方选择走法进行，at∼πt。游戏结束时，根据游戏规则对终止位置 sT 进行评分，计算游戏结果 z：-1 表示输，0 表示和，+1 表示赢。神经网络参数 θ 被更新，以最小化预测结果 vt 与游戏结果 z 之间的误差，并最大化策略向量 pt 与搜索概率 πt 的相似性。具体来说，参数 θ 通过梯度下降法在损失函数 l 上进行调整，该损失函数包括均方误差和交叉熵损失，

items.en: where c𝑐c is a parameter controlling the level of L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} weight regularisation. The updated parameters are used in subsequent games of self-play.
items.zh: 其中 c 是控制 L2 权重正则化水平的参数。更新后的参数用于后续的自我对弈游戏。

items.en: The AlphaZero algorithm described in this paper differs from the original AlphaGo Zero algorithm in several respects.
items.zh: 本文描述的 AlphaZero 算法与原始的 AlphaGo Zero 算法在几个方面有所不同。

items.en: AlphaGo Zero estimates and optimises the probability of winning, assuming binary win/loss outcomes. AlphaZero instead estimates and optimises the expected outcome, taking account of draws or potentially other outcomes.
items.zh: AlphaGo Zero 估计并优化获胜概率，假设二元胜负结果。AlphaZero 则估计并优化期望结果，考虑和棋或其他潜在结果。

items.en: The rules of Go are invariant to rotation and reflection. This fact was exploited in AlphaGo and AlphaGo Zero in two ways. First, training data was augmented by generating 8 symmetries for each position. Second, during MCTS, board positions were transformed using a randomly selected rotation or reflection before being evaluated by the neural network, so that the Monte-Carlo evaluation is averaged over different biases. The rules of chess and shogi are asymmetric, and in general symmetries cannot be assumed. AlphaZero does not augment the training data and does not transform the board position during MCTS.
items.zh: 围棋的规则对旋转和反射是不变的。这一事实在 AlphaGo 和 AlphaGo Zero 中以两种方式被利用。首先，训练数据通过为每个位置生成 8 个对称变换来增强。其次，在 MCTS 期间，棋盘位置在输入神经网络之前会使用随机选择的旋转或反射进行变换，以便蒙特卡洛评估在不同偏差上取平均。国际象棋和将棋的规则是不对称的，通常不能假设对称性。AlphaZero 不增强训练数据，也不在 MCTS 期间变换棋盘位置。

items.en: In AlphaGo Zero, self-play games were generated by the best player from all previous iterations. After each iteration of training, the performance of the new player was measured against the best player; if it won by a margin of 55%percent5555\% then it replaced the best player and self-play games were subsequently generated by this new player. In contrast, AlphaZero simply maintains a single neural network that is updated continually, rather than waiting for an iteration to complete. Self-play games are generated by using the latest parameters for this neural network, omitting the evaluation step and the selection of best player.
items.zh: 在 AlphaGo Zero 中，自我对弈游戏由之前所有迭代中的最佳玩家生成。每次训练迭代后，新玩家的表现与最佳玩家进行比较；如果它以 55% 的胜率获胜，则取代最佳玩家，随后由这个新玩家生成自我对弈游戏。相比之下，AlphaZero 简单地维护一个持续更新的单一神经网络，而不是等待迭代完成。自我对弈游戏通过使用该神经网络的最新参数生成，省略了评估步骤和最佳玩家的选择。

items.en: AlphaGo Zero tuned the hyper-parameter of its search by Bayesian optimisation. In AlphaZero we reuse the same hyper-parameters for all games without game-specific tuning. The sole exception is the noise that is added to the prior policy to ensure exploration (?); this is scaled in proportion to the typical number of legal moves for that game type.
items.zh: AlphaGo Zero 通过贝叶斯优化调整其搜索的超参数。在 AlphaZero 中，我们对所有游戏重用相同的超参数，无需针对特定游戏进行调整。唯一的例外是添加到先验策略中以确保探索的噪声（?）；该噪声根据该游戏类型的典型合法走法数量进行缩放。

items.en: Like AlphaGo Zero, the board state is encoded by spatial planes based only on the basic rules for each game. The actions are encoded by either spatial planes or a flat vector, again based only on the basic rules for each game (see Methods).
items.zh: 与 AlphaGo Zero 一样，棋盘状态仅基于每个游戏的基本规则通过空间平面进行编码。动作也仅基于每个游戏的基本规则通过空间平面或扁平向量进行编码（见方法部分）。

items.en: We applied the AlphaZero algorithm to chess, shogi, and also Go. Unless otherwise specified, the same algorithm settings, network architecture, and hyper-parameters were used for all three games. We trained a separate instance of AlphaZero for each game. Training proceeded for 700,000 steps (mini-batches of size 4,096) starting from randomly initialised parameters, using 5,000 first-generation TPUs (?) to generate self-play games and 64 second-generation TPUs to train the neural networks.111The original AlphaGo Zero paper used GPUs to train the neural networks. Further details of the training procedure are provided in the Methods.
items.zh: 我们将 AlphaZero 算法应用于国际象棋、将棋以及围棋。除非另有说明，所有三种游戏使用相同的算法设置、网络架构和超参数。我们为每种游戏训练了一个单独的 AlphaZero 实例。训练进行了 700,000 步（小批量大小为 4,096），从随机初始化的参数开始，使用 5,000 个第一代 TPU（?）生成自我对弈游戏，以及 64 个第二代 TPU 训练神经网络。¹ 训练过程的更多细节在方法部分提供。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Training AlphaZero for 700,000 steps. Elo ratings were computed from evaluation games between different players when given one second per move. a Performance of AlphaZero in chess, compared to 2016 TCEC world-champion program Stockfish. b Performance of AlphaZero in shogi, compared to 2017 CSA world-champion program Elmo. c Performance of AlphaZero in Go, compared to AlphaGo Lee and AlphaGo Zero (20 block / 3 day) (?).
items.capZh: 图1：训练AlphaZero 70万步。Elo等级分是根据不同棋手在每步棋思考时间为一秒时的评估对局计算得出的。a AlphaZero在国际象棋中的表现，与2016年TCEC世界冠军程序Stockfish的比较。b AlphaZero在日本将棋中的表现，与2017年CSA世界冠军程序Elmo的比较。c AlphaZero在围棋中的表现，与AlphaGo Lee和AlphaGo Zero（20个残差块/3天）的比较。

items.en: We evaluated the fully trained instances of AlphaZero against Stockfish, Elmo and the previous version of AlphaGo Zero (trained for 3 days) in chess, shogi and Go respectively, playing 100 game matches at tournament time controls of one minute per move. AlphaZero and the previous AlphaGo Zero used a single machine with 4 TPUs. Stockfish and Elmo played at their strongest skill level using 64 threads and a hash size of 1GB. AlphaZero convincingly defeated all opponents, losing zero games to Stockfish and eight games to Elmo (see Supplementary Material for several example games), as well as defeating the previous version of AlphaGo Zero (see Table 1).
items.zh: 我们评估了完全训练的 AlphaZero 实例，分别与国际象棋的 Stockfish、将棋的 Elmo 以及围棋的先前版本 AlphaGo Zero（训练了 3 天）进行对战，在锦标赛时间控制下每步一分钟进行 100 局比赛。AlphaZero 和之前的 AlphaGo Zero 使用一台带有 4 个 TPU 的机器。Stockfish 和 Elmo 以最强技能水平运行，使用 64 个线程和 1GB 哈希大小。AlphaZero 令人信服地击败了所有对手，对 Stockfish 零负，对 Elmo 八负（参见补充材料中的几个示例对局），并击败了先前版本的 AlphaGo Zero（见表 1）。

items.en: We also analysed the relative performance of AlphaZero’s MCTS search compared to the state-of-the-art alpha-beta search engines used by Stockfish and Elmo. AlphaZero searches just 80 thousand positions per second in chess and 40 thousand in shogi, compared to 70 million for Stockfish and 35 million for Elmo. AlphaZero compensates for the lower number of evaluations by using its deep neural network to focus much more selectively on the most promising variations – arguably a more “human-like” approach to search, as originally proposed by Shannon (?). Figure 2 shows the scalability of each player with respect to thinking time, measured on an Elo scale, relative to Stockfish or Elmo with 40ms thinking time. AlphaZero’s MCTS scaled more effectively with thinking time than either Stockfish or Elmo, calling into question the widely held belief (?, ?) that alpha-beta search is inherently superior in these domains.333The prevalence of draws in high-level chess tends to compress the Elo scale, compared to shogi or Go.
items.zh: 我们还分析了 AlphaZero 的 MCTS 搜索与 Stockfish 和 Elmo 使用的先进 alpha-beta 搜索引擎的相对性能。AlphaZero 在国际象棋中每秒仅搜索 8 万个位置，在将棋中每秒 4 万个，而 Stockfish 为 7000 万，Elmo 为 3500 万。AlphaZero 通过使用其深度神经网络更选择性地关注最有希望的变化来补偿较少的评估次数——这可以说是更“类人”的搜索方法，最初由香农提出（?）。图 2 显示了每个玩家在思考时间方面的可扩展性，以 Elo 等级分衡量，相对于思考时间 40ms 的 Stockfish 或 Elmo。AlphaZero 的 MCTS 在思考时间上的可扩展性优于 Stockfish 或 Elmo，这质疑了广泛持有的信念（?, ?），即在这些领域中 alpha-beta 搜索本质上是优越的。³

items.capEn: Figure 2: Scalability of AlphaZero with thinking time, measured on an Elo scale. a Performance of AlphaZero and Stockfish in chess, plotted against thinking time per move. b Performance of AlphaZero and Elmo in shogi, plotted against thinking time per move.
items.capZh: 图2：AlphaZero随思考时间的可扩展性，以Elo等级分衡量。a AlphaZero和Stockfish在国际象棋中的表现，按每步棋思考时间绘制。b AlphaZero和Elmo在日本将棋中的表现，按每步棋思考时间绘制。

items.en: Finally, we analysed the chess knowledge discovered by AlphaZero. Table Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm analyses the most common human openings (those played more than 100,000 times in an online database of human chess games (?)). Each of these openings is independently discovered and played frequently by AlphaZero during self-play training. When starting from each human opening, AlphaZero convincingly defeated Stockfish, suggesting that it has indeed mastered a wide spectrum of chess play.
items.zh: 最后，我们分析了 AlphaZero 发现的国际象棋知识。表 1 分析了最常见的人类开局（在人类国际象棋对局在线数据库中下过超过 100,000 次的开局（?））。这些开局中的每一个都被 AlphaZero 在自我对弈训练中独立发现并频繁使用。当从每个人类开局开始时，AlphaZero 令人信服地击败了 Stockfish，表明它确实掌握了广泛的国际象棋玩法。
